Ground Truth:
exp(x) + y - z = 0

Component functions:
  g1(x) = exp(x)
  g2(y) = y
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
1.7401209 - 1.46276084324153*1.8002499**(1.72190411754984*x) + (-1.48736434800229*y - 0.0403204809255206) + 1.47499923135212*z - 1.70819963755432 = 0.0010
R²_ortho = 0.5634

Component functions:
  g1(x) = 1.7401209 - 1.46276084324153*1.8002499**(1.72190411754984*x)
  g2(y) = -1.48736434800229*y - 0.0403204809255206
  g3(z) = 1.47499923135212*z - 1.70819963755432
